title: Yossi Matias on the golden age of research
summary: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, discusses Google's research-to-impact cycle spanning flood forecasting, medical AI, and scientific discovery tools. The conversation covers speculative decoding, generative UI, quantum milestones including the Willow chip, and frameworks like Co-Scientist and ERA for research assistance.
writeup: Yossi Matias, VP and Head of Google Research, walks through Google's research-to-impact cycle across flood forecasting, medical AI, and scientific discovery tools. The discussion covers technical advances including speculative decoding, generative UI, and quantum milestones such as the Willow chip, along with research-assistance frameworks like Co-Scientist and ERA. The throughline is how Google moves from foundational research to deployed applications across these domains.
